tasks.title: Fix timing attack vulnerability in API key validation
tasks.description: The validateApiKey function in src/db/index.ts uses simple equality comparison for API key hashes, which is vulnerable to timing attacks. Use crypto.timingSafeEqual() for secure comparison.

tasks.title: Add path traversal protection to storage API
tasks.description: The storage API's path sanitization is insufficient. Add path resolution validation (path.resolve + startsWith check) to all storage endpoints to prevent directory traversal attacks.

tasks.title: Implement rate limiting on authentication endpoints
tasks.description: The /api/login endpoint has no rate limiting, making it vulnerable to brute force attacks. Add rate limiting middleware (e.g., hono-rate-limiter) to prevent credential stuffing attacks.

tasks.title: Enforce API keys configuration in production
tasks.description: The default development API key 'dev-key-change-in-production' could accidentally be used in production. Add a startup check that refuses to run in production without proper API_KEYS configuration.

tasks.title: Implement Zod-based input validation
tasks.description: Zod is a dependency but not used. Implement Zod schemas for all API input validation to ensure consistent, type-safe validation across all endpoints. Add request size limits to prevent DoS attacks.

tasks.title: Add /.well-known/skill.md endpoint for hyper-micro
tasks.description: Add a GET /.well-known/skill.md endpoint that serves the hyper-micro skill documentation. This allows agents/developers to discover the project's capabilities and conventions programmatically.
successCriteria: Skill documentation describes hyper-micro capabilities, API endpoints, and usage
tasks.notes: Endpoint already implemented in src/server/index.ts reading from SKILL.md. SKILL.md contains comprehensive documentation covering all API endpoints (data, storage, auth, admin), authentication, configuration, and usage examples.

tasks.title: Add enhanced query endpoint for database documents
tasks.description: Add a dedicated POST /api/dbs/:db/query endpoint for advanced range queries with additional options: reverse order (descending), count-only mode, key-only mode (no values), and value-based filtering. The current GET /api/dbs/:db/docs supports basic range queries with startKey/endKey/limit/prefix, but lacks advanced query features.
successCriteria: Support reverse: boolean for descending order
Support count: boolean to return only document count
Support keysOnly: boolean to return keys without values
Support prefix for key prefix filtering
Support limit and offset for pagination
Optional: support valueFilter for basic value matching (e.g., field equality)
Maintain backward compatibility with existing GET /api/dbs/:db/docs endpoint
tasks.reference: Current listDocuments() in src/db/index.ts supports startKey/endKey/limit/prefix
tasks.notes: LMDB getRange() supports reverse order natively via rangeOptions.reverse. Consider adding batch query support for multiple ranges in single request.
